title: Mit's Synths
description: Adds synths/robots to Minecraft that will follow your commands and help you!
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51540c0d3c1884cf126372732e9e5f6ed422565f_0.webp)

# Mit's Synths - Minecraft: Become Players

Mit's Synths is a Minecraft Forge mod that adds Synths (robots) from popular games and TV shows such as [Detroit: Become Human](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt5158314/) and [Humans](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt4122068). These Synths are able to follow you around, act as an extra inventory, and protect you from dangers. But be warned, treat them badly, and you may have an uprising on your hands.

## Features

*   **Synths**: Synthetic robots that will aid you in your day-to-day activities. Whether it be carrying your luggage, protecting you from mobs, or even just being a friend, they can do it!
*   **Synth Personalization**: During the setup process, you are able to select different options for your synth. Such options include their name and gender.
*   **Synth Inventories**: As they walk around, Synths will pick up items left on the floor and store them in their inventories. These inventories can be accessed by crouching and right-clicking a synth with an empty hand. Please note, you must own the Synth to do this. They will also drop their inventories upon death.
*   **Synth Protectors**: When you attack or are attacked by a mob, your nearby synths will come to your aid and attempt to assist you.

## Synth Instructions

When communicating with your synth, it is important to state their name with each instruction. Then again, you could just say "**synths**" and all of your owned synths in a 25-block radius will follow that command.

*   **stay**: Tell your synth/s to stay where they are and not move.
*   **follow**: Tell your synth/s to follow you around.
*   **roam**: Tell your synth/s to roam around randomly. (careful not to lose them)

**Examples:** _phrasing doesn't have to match but it must have the name and the instruction_

*   "**_Alex stay_**", "**_Alex please stay_**" - Tell your synth (Alex) to stay.
*   "**_Synths stay_**", "**_Synths, stay._**" - Tell all your synths to stay. _(within 25 blocks)_
